name: step-08-full-global-validation
title: Run Step 08 full-global validation
description: Execute Step 08 (validate gridded products against ship cells) across the full Step 07B validation set. Stage 3 (strict_primary_multibeam_cells, 2,398,774 cells) completed PASS 2026-05-26; Stage 4 (expanded_primary_ship_cells, 2,732,689 cells) handled in child task 05-27-stage4-expanded-primary-sensitivity, completed PASS 2026-05-27; Stage 5 non-primary diagnostics completed PASS 2026-05-27; Stage 6 final cross-stage report completed PASS 2026-05-27. Legacy task description referenced 2,394,115 cells (pre-integration JAMSTEC-only baseline).
creator: Ruichen Zhou
notes: Stage 3 PASS 2026-05-26T18:52Z (elapsed 2164s, commit 1d327e6); Stage 3 audit GO 2026-05-27 (see strict_primary_full_validation_audit_report.md). Stage 4 PASS 2026-05-27T05:07Z (elapsed 2508s validation + 45s compare); Stage 4 audit GO for sensitivity / coverage use, NO-GO for replacing strict baseline (see stage4_expanded_primary_validation_audit_report.md). Documented unreliable singlebeam window: Drake Passage / S Sandwich Trench lat_band -60° (59 gap-fill cells, +2861m mean error). Stage 5 PASS 2026-05-27T17:17Z (elapsed 281.8s): supplementary_singlebeam_cells=12,277,633 and regional_mrar_experiment_cells=9,019,383 remained role-pure and unique; all 16 safety checks PASS; non-primary overlap is diagnostic only. Stage 6 PASS 2026-05-27T18:02Z (elapsed 23.3s): final cross-stage report recommends strict_primary_multibeam_cells as the authoritative global baseline, expanded_primary_ship_cells as secondary sensitivity / coverage-expansion output, supplementary singlebeam as coverage diagnostics only, regional MRAR as explicit regional sensitivity only, and no global SWOT_T1 claim. Stage 6 review added explicit gap-fill attribution checks against Stage 4 comparison counts, expanded_fill flags, and ncei_singlebeam source membership.
